policies.name: Strict DoR/DoD Acceptance Matrix
policies.description: No Role may expend network resources, mutate cross-domain states, or progress macro/micro trackers without first physically satisfying the Definition of Ready (DoR) and verifying the Definition of Done (DoD). Attempting to execute unconstrained workflows is an immediate breach of Swarm Governance.

policies.name: San Gen Shugi Telemetry
policies.description: Progress tracking must be tied to algorithmic verification of actual files (wc -l, du -sh), not mocked static integers.

roles.name: Institutional Gatekeeper
roles.domain: Global Telemetry, Resource Allocation, and Governance Enforcement
accountabilities: Halting all Sub-Swarm execution if DoR constraints are calculated as RED (Unmet).
Enforcing physical validation ledgers prior to execution (RCA Traces).

roles.name: Agentic Clean Room Modulator
accountabilities: Preventing amnesia and hallucination bleed between parallel executing IDE roles.
